sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84876" key="polu/qreptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-θρεπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84876.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">much-nourished,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄνθη π.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the many</tr_> flowers <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that grow,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg001:43:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
